offer: For Amazon sellers processing 10–50 contracts/month, missed renewals cause supplier penalties. We provide a vendor contract management tool instead of manual tracking through spreadsheets.
problem: Difficulty in tracking contract renewals and terms with multiple vendors.
channels_free: Post in Reddit communities where Amazon sellers seek advice
Indie Hackers discussions on similar challenges
DM outreach to Amazon sellers with demo video
Community forums for Amazon sellers sharing tools
try_it: Let users try Store agreements securely and Monitor contract terms on 1-3 items
pay: unknown with a clear upgrade path
cheap_execution_checklist: 1-page landing page with the one-liner and CTA
Short demo video showing the manual-first workflow
Collect 10 short interviews from target users
Offer early-access onboarding for first 10 users
Post a weekly progress update in a relevant community
automation_simplification_ideas: One-click export of a simple report
